case_title: LIEN LU VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DBA MUNI et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LU, LIEN AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DBA MUNI SANFORD, VELMA JOYCE DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-13-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-10-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-28-2006
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-05-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: POS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LU, LIEN
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON SEP-05-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-13-2006 CONTINUED TO DEC-01-2006 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212,. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-16-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-01-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DBA MUNI
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-16-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
